message:
feat: add async process management module

Add new process module for async child process management, providing
non-blocking equivalents of std::process types.

Features:
- Async Command builder with spawn/output/status methods
- Configurable Stdio (Inherit/Piped/Null)
- Process piping for stdin/stdout/stderr
- Unix-specific implementations using fork/exec

The module uses unsafe code for Unix process spawning and signal
handling (waitpid), with full documentation of safety invariants.

Cancel-safety notes:
- Process spawning is synchronous (syscall)
- wait() can be cancelled; process continues running
- Use kill_on_drop(true) for automatic cleanup on cancellation
- I/O operations are cancel-safe (partial reads/writes fine)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
